title: Nexus Tasks State
description: Schema for .nexus/state/tasks.json — the task list produced by nx-plan and mutated by MCP tools during nx-run

goal.description: High-level goal statement for the current execution cycle

decisions.description: Key decisions carried forward from planning that constrain execution

tasks.description: Ordered list of tasks to be executed

context.description: Background context and motivation for this task

deps.description: Task IDs that must complete before this task can start

plan_issue.description: ID of the plan issue that originated this task

owner.description: Agent type assigned to own this task (e.g. 'engineer')

owner_agent_id.description: Specific agent instance ID assigned to this task

owner_reuse_policy.description: Policy controlling agent instance reuse across task executions

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this task was created
